author: Авакумов Данил Эдуардович
objective: Discover the empirical law governing emergent role weights in cooperative coevolution by fitting a generalized power-law model using role signal statistics.

background.interpretation: Strong negative correlation suggests emergent weights follow an inverse signal law rather than a direct signal-to-noise law.

research_hypothesis.statement: Emergent role weights follow a generalized power law based on role signal statistics.

experiment_blocks.title: PARAMETER GRID GENERATION
experiment_blocks.goal: Generate alpha/beta parameter grid for model search.

experiment_blocks.title: WEIGHT PREDICTION SIMULATION
experiment_blocks.goal: Compute predicted role weights for each alpha/beta pair.

experiment_blocks.title: MODEL FITTING
experiment_blocks.goal: Compare predicted weights against observed coevolution weights.

experiment_blocks.title: BEST LAW DISCOVERY
experiment_blocks.goal: Find alpha/beta combination minimizing MAE and maximizing correlation.

experiment_blocks.title: ROBUSTNESS ANALYSIS
experiment_blocks.goal: Verify discovered law across seeds and across generations.

experiment_blocks.title: THEORETICAL INTERPRETATION
experiment_blocks.goal: Interpret discovered law and connect it to cooperative coevolution dynamics.

definition_of_done: Grid search completed across alpha/beta parameter space.
Predicted weights computed for all parameter combinations.
